description.unified: Deals Magic DMG 3 time to a random enemy and nearby enemies, and stuns them for [3->1.8]sec.
Creates [Belladonna Seed] in the area around the target for [10->7]sec. [Belladonna Seed]: Deals Magic DMG to nearby enemies every [2->1]sec and reduces Healing Rate by [30% for 5 sec->25% for 1sec].
Deals Magic DMG 6 time to enemies in a wide frontal area and knocks them down for [3->1]sec.
On Normal and Skill Attacks, inflicts [Poison] on the target, dealing Magic DoT every 1sec for 20sec and reducing Healing Rate by [5%->1%]. This effect stacks up to [5->25] times.

dark.unified: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but damage dealt is increased by 100%. [Recover 250 Mana on Crit->(removed)]
Enemies hit suffer increased status ailment duration by [30%->20%] for 5 sec.

light.unified: Mana cost increases by [1->1000], but damage increases by 100%.

dark.unified: Mana cost is increased by [1->1000], but removes beneficial effects from enemies within range.

light.unified: For each [Poison] stack, the target's Attack is reduced by [5%->1%].

dark.unified: If the target is a boss, [Poison] damage increases by [x3->100%].

description.unified: [Thornbush Forest] Increases DMG by 50% and reduces Cooldown by {0} sec.
[Wrath of the Forest] Increases DMG by {0}%. Upon a Crit Hit on enemies with 5 or more stacks of Poison, reduces Cooldown by 4%.
[Poison] makes Poison effect irremovable and increases [M.DMG taken by->DMG dealt to Bosses by] {0}%.

dark.unified: At the start of battle, all skill cooldowns are reduced by 30%, and damage dealt to non-hero enemies is increased by [20%->10%] for 90 sec. The damage increase stacks up to 5 times and cannot be dispelled.

description.unified: Every 7 sec, deals Magic Damage equal to {0}% of Attack Power to poisoned enemies, reduces their Magic Defense by {1}% for 10 sec, and increases their Magic Damage taken by {2}%.
